title: Navigate to products section and view available product list
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Locate and click the Shop navigation link
Verify the products listing page loads
Verify multiple product tiles are visible on the page
expected_result: A list of available products is displayed with product tiles and filter options visible
kane_objective: User can navigate to the products section of the site and view a list of available products
source_description: User can navigate to the products section of the site and view a list of available products

title: Filter products by category
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Go to a category page
Locate filter chips such as Travel, Cash Back, or Rewards
Click a filter chip
Verify the card list updates to show filtered results
expected_result: Filtered product results are displayed after applying a filter
kane_objective: User can use filters (e.g., rewards, travel, cashback) to refine results
source_description: User can use filters (e.g., rewards, travel, cashback) to refine results

title: Click a product to view details including price and description
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Search for a product
Click on any product tile or title
Verify the product detail page loads
Verify benefits, annual fee, and rewards information is visible
expected_result: Product detail page is displayed showing specific item information
kane_objective: User can click on a product to view details
source_description: User can click on a product to view details

title: View product highlights without logging in
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/ without logging in
Scroll through the home page
Verify product highlights or featured section is visible
Verify no login prompt blocks the content
expected_result: Product highlights are visible on the page without requiring login
kane_objective: User can see clear card comparison or highlights without logging in
source_description: User can see clear card comparison or highlights without logging in

title: Search results are relevant to selected filters or criteria
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Search for an item
Apply a filter
Verify the displayed items are relevant to the selected filter
Check that item descriptions match the search term
expected_result: Results shown are relevant to the selected category or search term
kane_objective: User receives relevant results based on selected filters or search criteria
source_description: User receives relevant results based on selected filters or search criteria
